title: French Bulldog Money 'Piggy' bank ceramic novelty coin store saver or home decoration, great novelty Frenchie Dog lover gift
features: Novelty ceramic French Bulldog 'Piggy' bank money box by Lesser & Pavey.
Lovely colouring and detail, with a great gloss finish.
Wide coin slot opening and large plugged hole in the base for easy emptying.
Comes gift boxed, making this a fabulous novelty gift for any Frenchie lover!
Money Box measures: height 15.5cm (6 1/8"), depth 9.5cm (3 3/4"), width 9.5cm (3 3/4") all approx.
Matching Salt & Pepper shakers also available in the same range.
